title: Funding allocations to training providers: 2025 to 2026
body: "Allocation / contract values data 2025 to 2026 (October 2025)  The funding year contract values provide maximum contract value information as at October 2025 for colleges, training organisations and employers that have a contract for 2025 to 2026. It excludes contract values where the agency is discussing current delivery performance.  Related information    Funding allocations to training providers: 2024 to 2025 (previous year’s publication) Adult education and skills funding allocations Adult education and skills funding   "

taxons.title: Data collection for further education providers
